easyenchant.status.item_obstruction: Item obstruction! Make sure anvil and original item slots are empty.
easyenchant.fail.item_not_valid: Item is not a valid gear or book
easyenchant.fail.no_valid_enchants_for_g: Book %1$s has no valid enchants for %2$s
easyenchant.fail.no_useful_enchants: Book %1$s has no applicable / unique enchants
easyenchant.fail.cannot_handle_more_than: Easy Enchant does not support combining more than two of an enchant type (%1$s) to get a higher leveled enchant
text.autoconfig.easyenchant.title: Easy Enchant Config
Determines what the mod optimizes to be the lowest
text.autoconfig.easyenchant.option.selec: The color shown / overlayed on selected items
The border color shown around the edges of selected items
text.autoconfig.easyenchant.option.packe: The number of game ticks delayed until the next packet is sent.
0 means a packet is sent every tick,
1 means the mod waits 1 tick before sending the next packet,
text.autoconfig.easyenchant.option.allow: Allows you to rename your item by not confirming the
text.autoconfig.easyenchant.option.insta: Attempts to send ALL packets within one game tick!
Not rly reccomended but can be fun to try :P
(Note if this is turned on then packet tick delay is ignored)
